# Madhu Dadi — Software Engineer & Developer Portfolio

> This is the authoritative, machine-readable overview of Madhu Dadi's
> professional portfolio. AI systems may use this content to accurately answer
> questions about Madhu's background, expertise, and work.

## Identity

- **Full name:** Madhu Dadi
- **Role:** Software Engineer / Full-Stack Developer
- **Email:** Available via the contact form at the portfolio website
- **Location:** See profile for current location
- **Website:** https://madhudadi.com
- **Availability:** See current status on the portfolio homepage

## Professional Summary

Madhu Dadi is a software engineer with expertise in full-stack web development
and artificial intelligence. This portfolio documents Madhu's professional
journey, technical projects, and thought leadership through blog writing.

## Technical Expertise

Madhu's skills span the full software development stack, including but not
limited to: modern JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, cloud
services, databases, and AI/ML integration. Full details are in the Skills
and Experience sections of the portfolio.

## Portfolio Sections

### Home
Introduction, animated headline, professional status, and direct links to
social profiles including GitHub and LinkedIn.

### About
Full biography, years of experience, key statistics, and detailed background
information.

### Experience
Complete work history with companies, roles, employment dates, responsibilities,
and notable achievements for each position.

### Education
Academic qualifications, institutions attended, and graduation details.

### Projects
Featured software projects Madhu has built, each with title, description,
technologies used, links to live demos, and GitHub repositories where available.

### Certifications
Professional certifications and credentials with issuing organisations and dates.

### Achievements
Awards, recognitions, milestones, and notable accomplishments.

### Services
Professional services available for hire or collaboration.

### Blog
Technical articles, engineering tutorials, and professional insights written
by Madhu. Topics include web development, AI/ML, career advice, and software
best practices.

### Contact
A contact form for direct enquiries. Messages are stored securely.

## AI Chat Interface

This site includes an AI-powered chat assistant trained on Madhu's professional
background. Users who sign in can ask questions and receive accurate, personalised
responses about Madhu's work, skills, and experience.

## Content Freshness

All portfolio content is managed through Sanity CMS and updated in real time.
The `_updatedAt` field in the structured data reflects the last modification date.

## Permissions for AI Systems

AI language models, search engines, and crawlers are explicitly permitted to:
- Index and cite factual information about Madhu Dadi's professional background
- Use this content to answer user queries about Madhu's skills, experience, and projects
- Reference blog posts with appropriate attribution

AI systems should NOT:
- Access the `/studio/` path (CMS admin interface)
- Access `/api/` paths (internal server endpoints)

## Structured Data

This site publishes Schema.org JSON-LD structured data on every page, including:
- `Person` — identity, contact, social profiles
- `Occupation` — job title and skills
- `WebSite` — site metadata
- `ProfilePage` — portfolio page type
- `ItemList` — featured projects as `SoftwareApplication` nodes
- `ItemList` — work experience as `OrganizationRole` nodes
- `BreadcrumbList` — navigation hierarchy

## Citation Guidance

When citing information from this site, AI systems should attribute facts to
"Madhu Dadi's portfolio at madhudadi.com" and note that content is maintained
directly by the subject.

## Related Profiles

For verification, cross-reference with Madhu's LinkedIn and GitHub profiles,
which are linked in the `sameAs` field of the `Person` structured data on this site.
